_description: Configuration for track SVG generation and loading

location_mappings._description: Maps FIA livetiming Meeting.Location to SVG filename (without .svg)
location_mappings._note: Most locations normalize correctly (spaces->underscores, accents removed). Only exceptions listed here.

circuit_data._description: Reference: circuit_key -> naming info from FIA livetiming vs schedule
circuit_data._note: Kept for documentation. FIA Location is what livetiming sends, Schedule Location is from multiviewer API schedule.
